Enum Class PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause>
org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause>, Constable
Enclosing class:
PlayerTeleportEvent
public static enum PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause extends Enum<PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause>

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    COMMAND
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player executing a command
    CONSUMABLE_EFFECT
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player consuming an item with a ConsumeEffect.TeleportRandomly effect
    DISMOUNT
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player exiting a vehicle
    END_GATEWAY
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering an End gateway
    END_PORTAL
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering an End portal
    ENDER_PEARL
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player throwing an Ender Pearl
    EXIT_BED
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player exiting a bed
    NETHER_PORTAL
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering a Nether portal
    PLUGIN
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a plugin
    SPECTATE
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player teleporting to an Entity/Player via the spectator menu
    UNKNOWN
    Indicates the teleportation was caused by an event not covered by this enum

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause
    CHORUS_FRUIT
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    in favor of CONSUMABLE_EFFECT

    • ENDER_PEARL

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause ENDER_PEARL
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player throwing an Ender Pearl

    • COMMAND

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause COMMAND
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player executing a command

    • PLUGIN

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause PLUGIN
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a plugin

    • NETHER_PORTAL

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause NETHER_PORTAL
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering a Nether portal

    • END_PORTAL

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause END_PORTAL
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering an End portal

    • SPECTATE

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause SPECTATE
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player teleporting to an Entity/Player via the spectator menu

    • END_GATEWAY

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause END_GATEWAY
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player entering an End gateway

    • CONSUMABLE_EFFECT

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause CONSUMABLE_EFFECT
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player consuming an item with a ConsumeEffect.TeleportRandomly effect

    • DISMOUNT

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause DISMOUNT
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player exiting a vehicle

    • EXIT_BED

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause EXIT_BED
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player exiting a bed

    • UNKNOWN

      public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause UNKNOWN
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by an event not covered by this enum

  • Field Details

    • CHORUS_FRUIT

      @Deprecated(since="1.21.5", forRemoval=true) public static final PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause CHORUS_FRUIT
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      in favor of CONSUMABLE_EFFECT
      Indicates the teleportation was caused by a player consuming chorus fruit

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static PlayerTeleportEvent.TeleportCause valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
